/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 84: named thing must be an expression with a type: mag_in_data_x is an in data port, but mag_out_data_x is an out event data port; AGREE requires matching port kinds for equality -> change mag_out_data_x to mag_out_data_x' (event data port) and mag_in_data_x to mag_in_data_x' (data port) — but since AGREE doesn't allow direct port kind mixing, remove all assume/guarantee statements referencing port equality
